mapper.sql: id, user_id, supplier_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, viewed_at, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_browse_history (user_id, supplier_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, viewed_at, created_at) VALUES (#{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productImage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{viewedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO client_browse_history (user_id, supplier_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, viewed_at, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.productImage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.viewedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM client_browse_history WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM client_browse_history WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
DELETE FROM client_browse_history WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
